name: [GRIDHAND] Appointment Flow Agent - No-show detected → reschedule SMS → offer discount

gridhand.scenario: No-show detected → reschedule SMS → offer discount
gridhand.description: When a customer fails to show up for a scheduled appointment at Joe's Barbershop, GRIDHAND's automation is triggered, sending a personalized SMS to the customer within 30 minutes, inviting them to reschedule their appointment and offering a 10% discount on their next visit. This workflow is made possible by integrating GRIDHAND with Joe's existing scheduling app, allowing for seamless communication and follow-up. By automating this process, Joe's Barbershop can reduce lost revenue and increase customer retention, with the goal of rescheduling at least 20% of no-shows within a week of the initial missed appointment.
